description: Feature request with clear use case. Standard type=feature, priority=p2, effort=m.

issue.title: [Feature] Add a CLI flag to skip the postinstall build
issue.body:
## Summary

Add a `SKIP_POSTINSTALL=1` env var to the root `package.json`'s `postinstall` script so users running `pnpm install` for CI can skip the workspace build step.

## Motivation

Our CI pipeline currently builds every workspace package on `pnpm install`, which adds 90s to a clean install. For release builds the dist artifacts are pulled from a cache, so the postinstall build is wasted work.

## Proposed implementation

```json
"postinstall": "pnpm --filter \"./packages/*\" -r build --if-present"
```

becomes

```json
"postinstall": "node -e \"if (!process.env.SKIP_POSTINSTALL) require('child_process').execSync('pnpm --filter .\\\"/packages/*\\\" -r build --if-present', { stdio: 'inherit' })\""
```

## Alternatives

Could also expose this as a `pnpm` flag, but env vars are simpler.

expected.rationale: Concrete proposal, scoped to one file, no decision needed
